summary: Frontend-only regression after major refactor (GrowthStory pinned scroll scene, monogram Doctors, merged TheSplit). All data-testids present, no console/page errors, no horizontal overflow on desktop (1440x900) or mobile (375x812). Growth Story pinned scene works — captions transition and caption-3 becomes visible after scrolling through pin. Sections stack cleanly (growth-journey bottom == philosophy top, no overlap). TheSplit renders Aesthetique + Orthocare panels with photos on beige (BgStripper working), center-badge 'One Philosophy · Endless Care' present, icon rows populated. Doctors section uses pure SVG monogram cards (0 tags) with OJ/MG initials and correct role/bio text. Aesthetique CTA smooth-scrolls to #patient-journey (top ≈ 0). Footer address 'Lotus Plaza…201304', tel:+919811997993, wa.me/919811997993 all correct.
critical_code_review_comments: Sections folder has many now-unused legacy components (BrandPanel, BrandStory, ClinicChapter, ClosingCTA, GrowthJourney, Interstitial, SharedPhilosophyBridge) — consider pruning to reduce bundle/maintenance surface, but this is non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All acceptance criteria from iteration_4 review request verified. Screenshots confirm visual correctness: hero minimalist, tree seed→roots→trunk→branches, panels with photos on beige, monogram doctor cards, no overlap between pinned Growth Story and Philosophy.
